company_type: Financial Services - Credit Ratings, Benchmarks, Analytics and Workflow Solutions

dependencies: Third-party data suppliers for various products
AWS as preferred cloud provider for technology infrastructure
Third-party service providers for information technology outsourcing
risks: Consolidation of suppliers reducing number of partner firms and increasing fees
Termination of significant data agreements on short notice
Reliance on AWS for distributed computing infrastructure
Third-party service provider failures or disruptions

Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act requirements
EU credit rating agency regulation (CRA1, CRA3)
UK Financial Conduct Authority oversight
ESMA supervision in European Union
SEC oversight as NRSRO
EU Benchmark Regulation and UK Benchmark Regulation
Australian Benchmark Regulation (ASIC license)
MiFID II requirements in EU
IOSCO Principles for Oil Price Reporting Agencies
IOSCO Principles for Financial Benchmarks
Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) effective January 2025
EU ESG Ratings Regulation (effective mid-2026)
GDPR and global data privacy regulations
Pillar Two global minimum tax of 15%
Driver's Privacy Protection Act (DPPA)
Federal Trade Commission CARS Rule
Sanctions laws relating to Iran, Russia, Venezuela
Anti-corruption laws (US Foreign Corrupt Practices Act, UK Bribery Act 2010)
Import and export restrictions
Mandatory rotation requirements for credit rating agencies
Liability standards for credit rating agencies
ESG ratings provider oversight regimes
Data localization requirements in various jurisdictions
Cybersecurity and operational resilience standards

sanction_risks: US Treasury Office of Foreign Assets Control sanctions on Iran, Russia, Venezuela
